About.description: Full Stack Engineer with more than 2 years of experience in developing web applications using React, Java, Spring Boot, and microservices. Experience in building REST APIs, system integration, and deploying applications in production environments. Participation in enterprise projects working on both backend and frontend, with a focus on building scalable and maintainable software, applying best development practices, and working in agile environments

resp1.text: Development and implementation of REST APIs in enterprise environments using Java.

resp2.text: Backend business logic development and integration with internal and external systems.

resp3.text: Frontend development using React, JavaScript, and JSP.

resp4.text: Integration of enterprise platforms (Liferay) within backend architectures.

resp5.text: Working with relational databases (PostgreSQL and MySQL).

resp6.text: Participation in application evolution, incident resolution, and performance improvement.

resp7.text: Agile teamwork, code reviews, and continuous improvement.

resp1.text: Backend service development with Java and Spring Boot following clean architecture principles.

resp2.text: Design and implementation of REST APIs documented with Swagger/OpenAPI.

resp4.text: Integration of distributed systems using Kafka (event-driven architecture).

resp5.text: Development of unit and integration tests to ensure code quality.

resp6.text: Application of software engineering best practices and clean architecture.

resp7.text: Agile methodologies, daily meetings, and task tracking.

detail2.text: Completed the degree in 4 years, passing all courses on the first attempt, achieving 3 Honors (Distinction), 11 Excellent grades, and 18 Good grades

detail3.text: Honors: Waves and Electromagnetism, Statistics, and Computability

detail4.text: I also scored a 10 in my Final Degree Project (TFG), titled 'Web Platform for Academic Work Coordination'

detail5.text: Recognition awarded by the Indra Chair and the University of Oviedo for the best Final Degree Thesis in the year 2023/2024

project1.title: Personal Web Portfolio
project1.info: A web portfolio designed to showcase my projects, skills, and experience in an interactive and dynamic way. Developed using React and hosted on GitHub Pages

project2.title: Web Platform for Academic Work Coordination
project2.info: The project aims to address communication challenges and information loss commonly encountered when coordinating academic work, such as Final Degree Projects (TFG), through email. To resolve this, a web application was developed to centralize academic project management, offering features like role assignment, TFG creation and management, student assignment, file uploads, chat, video calls, task management, and report generation. The platform is designed to enhance collaboration between professors and students by providing an intuitive interface and leveraging modern technologies to ensure efficiency, scalability, and future adaptability. Ultimately, it serves as a comprehensive solution to centralize information and streamline the coordination of academic projects

project3.title: FootMatch
project3.info: Soccer application designed to provide users with comprehensive information and coverage of the football world. The app offers a wide range of features and functionalities tailored to soccer enthusiasts, including fans, players, and coaches

project4.title: Web Application for the company Nemorastur
project4.info: Proyecto personal para registrar empleados en una empresa real y realizar los informes y registros correspondientes sobre las tareas realizadas

project5.title: LoMap
project5.info: Decentralized web application that allows users to share points of interest with friends and acquaintances, using SOLID and React technology
